mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_records, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normal_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS late_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS missing_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leave_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendance_days FROM attendance_checkin WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND YEAR(check_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(check_date) = #{month}
